<p align="center">
  <strong>AI that lives where you do.</strong>
</p>

---

We build open-source software for running AI on hardware you own. Plus the hardware your trusted circle owns. Plus, when those aren't enough, a public swarm of strangers' GPUs you can rent in stablecoin.

> Read the [manifesto](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/manifesto) before the code.

## Projects

| Repo | What it is |
|---|---|
| [**unhosted**](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/unhosted) | Runtime + CLI. Pool devices into one inference cluster. |
| [**manifesto**](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/manifesto) | Why this project exists, in one document. |
| [**benchmarks**](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/benchmarks) | Honest numbers per hardware combo. Reproducible. |
| [**recipes**](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/recipes) | Community cluster configs. Mac + 4090. Pi mesh. Mixed homelab. |

## What we won't do

- We won't launch a token. There is no `$UNHOSTED`.
- We won't run a hosted tier and call it "managed Unhosted."
- We won't train on your prompts.
- We won't use your idle compute without explicit, per-session opt-in.
- We won't take VC money in a way that lets a board override the manifesto.

## Status

Pre-alpha. The brand exists. The product is being built in public. If that bothers you, come back in six months. If it sounds like fun, [the main repo](https://github.com/unhosted-ai/unhosted) is where to start.
